{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Project Manager",
  "description": "Alphabait Realty is a premium real estate development firm founded in 2022 and based in Abuja,KanoinNigeria. The company focuses on developing high-value residential and multi-use projects, emphasizing artistic design, architectural innovation, and quality construction. It aims to provide both profitable investment opportunities and sustainable housing solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Project Manager to oversee and deliver projects efficiently from inception to completion. The ideal candidate will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and managing resources to ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and within budget.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, execute, and monitor projects to ensure timely delivery.
	Define project scope, goals, and deliverables in collaboration with stakeholders.
	Develop detailed project plans, schedules, and budgets.
	Coordinate internal teams, contractors, and external stakeholders.
	Track project performance and provide regular progress reports.
	Identify risks and implement mitigation strategies.
	Ensure compliance with industry standards, safety regulations, and company policies.
	Manage project documentation, contracts, and approvals.
	Monitor resource allocation and optimize efficiency.
	Conduct project reviews and ensure continuous improvement.


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in project management (construction/real estate preferred).
	Strong leadership, communication, and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Primavera, or similar).
	Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.


Certifications (Required/Preferred):


	PMP (Project Management Professional) &ndash; highly preferred
	COREN (Council for the Regulation of Engineering in Nigeria) certification
	NSE (Nigerian Society of Engineers) membership
	Prince2 Certification (added advantage)
	NEBOSH or HSE Certification (for safety compliance).


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp;candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment.alphabaitrealty@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-13",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Alphabait Realty"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

Project Manager Job at Alphabait Realty




        
    

        
        Alphabait Realty is a premium real estate development firm founded in 2022 and based in Abuja,KanoinNigeria. The company focuses on developing high-value residential and multi-use projects, emphasizing artistic design, architectural innovation, and quality construction. It aims to provide both profitable investment opportunities and sustainable housing solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Project Manager
Job Location: Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Project Manager to oversee and deliver projects efficiently from inception to completion. The ideal candidate will be responsible for planning, coordinating, and managing resources to ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and within budget.


Key Responsibilities


	Plan, execute, and monitor projects to ensure timely delivery.
	Define project scope, goals, and deliverables in collaboration with stakeholders.
	Develop detailed project plans, schedules, and budgets.
	Coordinate internal teams, contractors, and external stakeholders.
	Track project performance and provide regular progress reports.
	Identify risks and implement mitigation strategies.
	Ensure compliance with industry standards, safety regulations, and company policies.
	Manage project documentation, contracts, and approvals.
	Monitor resource allocation and optimize efficiency.
	Conduct project reviews and ensure continuous improvement.


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or related field.
	Minimum of 5 years of experience in project management (construction/real estate preferred).
	Strong leadership, communication, and organizational skills.
	Proficiency in project management tools (e.g., MS Project, Primavera, or similar).
	Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.


Certifications (Required/Preferred):


	PMP (Project Management Professional) – highly preferred
	COREN (Council for the Regulation of Engineering in Nigeria) certification
	NSE (Nigerian Society of Engineers) membership
	Prince2 Certification (added advantage)
	NEBOSH or HSE Certification (for safety compliance).


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 per month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quality Assurance / Quality Control Team Lead",
  "description": "X-Force Engineering Limited is an engineering and infrastructure solutions company delivering high-quality engineering services across Nigeria and beyond. The company combines technical expertise, innovation, and strong project management to provide reliable engineering solutions.

The company offers services in design, construction, installation, project management, consultancy, and maintenance across civil, structural, mechanical, and electrical engineering disciplines. This integrated approach enables X-Force Engineering to manage projects from concept to completion while maintaining high standards of safety, quality, and efficiency.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Quality Assurance / Quality Control Team Lead

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja
Job type: Full-time (Onsite)

Role Overview


	The QA/QC Team Lead will oversee the day-to-day quality assurance and quality control activities on construction projects, leading a team of QA/QC inspectors and engineers to ensure all works are executed in strict compliance with project specifications, standards, and regulatory requirements.
	The ideal candidate brings hands-on construction experience and a strong commitment to delivering excellence.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and supervise the QA/QC team across all active construction sites.
	Implement and enforce the company&rsquo;s Quality Management System (QMS) on all projects.
	Carry out and coordinate site inspections, material testing, and quality audits.
	Review and approve Inspection &amp; Test Plans (ITPs), method statements, and quality control plans.
	Ensure all construction activities comply with approved drawings, specifications, and applicable standards.
	Identify, document, and manage non-conformances (NCRs) and drive timely resolution.
	Coordinate with project managers, site engineers, and consultants on quality-related issues.
	Monitor the quality performance of subcontractors and suppliers and take corrective action where necessary.
	Maintain comprehensive quality records, inspection reports, and documentation for all project phases.
	Conduct root cause analysis on defects or failures and implement preventive measures.
	Mentor and train junior QA/QC staff and site personnel on quality standards and procedures.
	Prepare and present regular quality performance reports to senior management.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Civil Engineering, Building Technology, or a related field.
	Minimum of 8 years of hands-on experience in QA/QC within the construction industry.
	Relevant professional certification (e.g. COREN, NIOB, NIA, ISO 9001 Lead Auditor) &mdash; MANDATORY.
	Experience in construction &mdash; Strong Advantage.
	Experience with high-rise structures and infrastructure projects &mdash; Added Advantage.
	Strong knowledge of construction codes, standards, and quality management systems (ISO 9001).
	Proficiency in quality documentation, reporting, and construction management software.
	Proven leadership, mentoring, and team management skills.
	Excellent attention to detail, analytical thinking, and problem-solving ability.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.


Key Competencies:


	Quality Assurance &amp; Control
	Site Inspection &amp; Materials Testing
	Non-Conformance &amp; Corrective Action Management
	Regulatory &amp; Standards Compliance
	Team Leadership &amp; Staff Development
	Technical Report Writing
	Stakeholder &amp; Consultant Liaison
	Risk Identification &amp; Mitigation


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@xforceengineeringlimited.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-02",

Quality Assurance / Quality Control Team Lead Job at X-Force Engineering Limited




        
    

        
        X-Force Engineering Limited is an engineering and infrastructure solutions company delivering high-quality engineering services across Nigeria and beyond. The company combines technical expertise, innovation, and strong project management to provide reliable engineering solutions.

The company offers services in design, construction, installation, project management, consultancy, and maintenance across civil, structural, mechanical, and electrical engineering disciplines. This integrated approach enables X-Force Engineering to manage projects from concept to completion while maintaining high standards of safety, quality, and efficiency.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Position: Quality Assurance / Quality Control Team Lead

Job Location: Abuja
Job type: Full-time (Onsite)

Role Overview


	The QA/QC Team Lead will oversee the day-to-day quality assurance and quality control activities on construction projects, leading a team of QA/QC inspectors and engineers to ensure all works are executed in strict compliance with project specifications, standards, and regulatory requirements.
	The ideal candidate brings hands-on construction experience and a strong commitment to delivering excellence.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and supervise the QA/QC team across all active construction sites.
	Implement and enforce the company’s Quality Management System (QMS) on all projects.
	Carry out and coordinate site inspections, material testing, and quality audits.
	Review and approve Inspection & Test Plans (ITPs), method statements, and quality control plans.
	Ensure all construction activities comply with approved drawings, specifications, and applicable standards.
	Identify, document, and manage non-conformances (NCRs) and drive timely resolution.
	Coordinate with project managers, site engineers, and consultants on quality-related issues.
	Monitor the quality performance of subcontractors and suppliers and take corrective action where necessary.
	Maintain comprehensive quality records, inspection reports, and documentation for all project phases.
	Conduct root cause analysis on defects or failures and implement preventive measures.
	Mentor and train junior QA/QC staff and site personnel on quality standards and procedures.
	Prepare and present regular quality performance reports to senior management.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering, Building Technology, or a related field.
	Minimum of 8 years of hands-on experience in QA/QC within the construction industry.
	Relevant professional certification (e.g. COREN, NIOB, NIA, ISO 9001 Lead Auditor) — MANDATORY.
	Experience in construction — Strong Advantage.
	Experience with high-rise structures and infrastructure projects — Added Advantage.
	Strong knowledge of construction codes, standards, and quality management systems (ISO 9001).
	Proficiency in quality documentation, reporting, and construction management software.
	Proven leadership, mentoring, and team management skills.
	Excellent attention to detail, analytical thinking, and problem-solving ability.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.


Key Competencies:


	Quality Assurance & Control
	Site Inspection & Materials Testing
	Non-Conformance & Corrective Action Management
	Regulatory & Standards Compliance
	Team Leadership & Staff Development
	Technical Report Writing
	Stakeholder & Consultant Liaison
	Risk Identification & Mitigation


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Manager (Sales)

Job Locations:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT), Lagos, and Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

	Responsible for driving sales growth, managing client relationships, and supporting daily sales operations. The role also involves leading junior sales staff and ensuring targets are consistently achieved.


Key Responsibilities


	Generate leads and convert prospects to customers
	Manage and grow existing client accounts
	Drive the full sales cycle from prospecting to closing
	Develop and implement sales strategies
	Prepare proposals and presentations for clients
	Maintain accurate records on CRM systems

	Acquire new clients consistently

	Grow revenue from existing clients

	Candidates should possess a B.Sc / HND with minimum of 3 years of experience in sales or account management

Account Manager (Sales) Job at Coollink Limited




        
    

        
        At Coollink, our passion drives us to create innovative technology solutions that empower enterprises and SMEs across Nigeria and Africa. For over two decades, we’ve been pioneering satellite broadband and IT services, bringing reliable, affordable connectivity to even the most remote regions. Now, we’re expanding our expertise to deliver more than just connectivity—we provide end-to-end IT solutions that fuel businesses of all sizes.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



From startups and SMEs to large enterprises, we offer the tools and support necessary to thrive in an increasingly digital world. Our IT services cover everything from cloud solutions and network security to managed services, ensuring businesses stay connected, secure, and efficient. With our Partners, we’re pushing the boundaries of what's possible, ensuring businesses and communities across Africa have access to world-class connectivity and IT solutions. Whether it's urban hubs or remote locations, geography is no barrier—we connect people to the technology that transforms lives and industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Manager (Sales)

Job Locations: Abuja (FCT), Lagos, and Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	Responsible for driving sales growth, managing client relationships, and supporting daily sales operations. The role also involves leading junior sales staff and ensuring targets are consistently achieved.


Key Responsibilities


	Generate leads and convert prospects to customers
	Manage and grow existing client accounts
	Drive the full sales cycle from prospecting to closing
	Develop and implement sales strategies
	Prepare proposals and presentations for clients
	Maintain accurate records on CRM systems
	Lead and support junior sales team members
	Work with technical teams to resolve client issues


Key KPIs


	Meet monthly sales targets
	Acquire new clients consistently
	Maintain low client churn
	Achieve strong lead conversion rates
	Grow revenue from existing clients


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a B.Sc / HND with minimum of 3 years of experience in sales or account management
	Strong communication and negotiation skills
	Good knowledge of CRM tools and Microsoft Office
	Experience in ISP/Telecom is an advantage.


Application Closing Date
15th April, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Preferred Location as the subject of the email (e.g., Account Manager – Lagos).    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Logistics Assistant",
  "description": "Lucky Fibres Limited started out making Nobel Carpets and rugs but pivoted into premium hair extensions by introducing Lush Hair in 2017. Since then, Lush Hair has become Increasingly Popular with consumers for its high quality and trendy styles.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Logistics Assistant supports the efficient movement, distribution, and tracking of goods across the supply chain.
	The role involves coordinating shipments, managing transport operations, ensuring compliance, and supporting logistics performance optimization.


Responsibilities


	Coordinate the transportation of goods from warehouses to customers or distribution centers.
	Plan route and schedule shipments to ensure timely delivery to customers.
	Monitor and track shipments using logistics software.
	Communicate with transporters, sales representatives and customers to resolve issues and ensure smooth operations.
	Optimize transportation routes to minimize costs and maximize efficiency.
	Documentation of shipments, transporter payment reconciliation and ensure compliance with regulatory requirements.
	Report directly to the national logistics manager.
	Support the logistics manager with the performance and addition of effective logistics vendors /transporters.
	To coordinate drivers and ensure the implementation of our logistics processes and standards of operations.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s degree in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, or related field.
	2+ years of experience in logistics or supply chain roles.
	Proficiency in logistics software and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Knowledge of transportation regulations, routes and international trade practices.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;Lushlndnational@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-02",

  },

Logistics Assistant Job at Lucky Fibres Limited




        
    

        
        Lucky Fibres Limited started out making Nobel Carpets and rugs but pivoted into premium hair extensions by introducing Lush Hair in 2017. Since then, Lush Hair has become Increasingly Popular with consumers for its high quality and trendy styles.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Assistant

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Logistics Assistant supports the efficient movement, distribution, and tracking of goods across the supply chain.
	The role involves coordinating shipments, managing transport operations, ensuring compliance, and supporting logistics performance optimization.


Responsibilities


	Coordinate the transportation of goods from warehouses to customers or distribution centers.
	Plan route and schedule shipments to ensure timely delivery to customers.
	Monitor and track shipments using logistics software.
	Communicate with transporters, sales representatives and customers to resolve issues and ensure smooth operations.
	Optimize transportation routes to minimize costs and maximize efficiency.
	Documentation of shipments, transporter payment reconciliation and ensure compliance with regulatory requirements.
	Report directly to the national logistics manager.
	Support the logistics manager with the performance and addition of effective logistics vendors /transporters.
	To coordinate drivers and ensure the implementation of our logistics processes and standards of operations.


Qualifications and Requirements


	Bachelor's degree in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, or related field.
	2+ years of experience in logistics or supply chain roles.
	Proficiency in logistics software and Microsoft Office Suite.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Knowledge of transportation regulations, routes and international trade practices.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
